The Signature Collection

Rigid Fiber Plant-Based Straw

Refined in form. Resilient by design.

Crafted from renewable plant fibers and finished in a clean, matte white, our signature straw holds its shape and elegance in both hot and cold drinks — no softening, no sogginess, no compromise.

Sustainable

Made from renewable plant-based fibers.

Durable

Holds strong in both hot and cold drinks.

Elevated Design

A refined silhouette for every setting.

Eco-Friendly

Biodegradable and better for our planet.

Beyond the Straw

The Cutlery Collection

Knives and sporks finished to the same premium standard.

Rigid Fiber Knife

A sturdy, serrated edge for effortless cutting. Plant-based, PFAS-free, and built to hold up through the whole meal.

Rigid Fiber Spork

The versatile hybrid utensil — equally at home with a salad, a bowl, or dessert. Plant-based, PFAS-free, and finished to match the rest of the set.

Designed for Beauty. Made for Every Sip.

A Better Straw for Beautiful Drinks.

Rigid Fiber straws bring together refined presentation, reliable performance, and responsible materials. Made from renewable plant-based fibers, they stay strong in every drink and look beautiful in every setting.
